LoadSettings()if not(isfile and isfile(N))then return false end local G,l=pcall(function()local G=readfile(N)return L:JSONDecode(G)end)if G and l then _G[X2[m2("\238\014\021\228\210\029\019\230",21557514063616-(-536832))]]=l return true end return false end function GetSetting(G,l)return
